component.name: Jester's Game Vault
component.summary: PS3 FTP vault for owned backups and homebrew

description.p: Jester's Game Vault is a PS3-focused desktop FTP client for managing legally owned backups and homebrew on jailbroken PS3 systems running webMAN MOD.
It provides local and remote file panes, PS3 ISO key pairing checks, transfer progress, webMAN refresh utilities, and delete confirmation for PS3 storage paths.
Adds Linux packaging support with Flatpak and a portable Linux tarball.
